title: Love
description: Bible verses about God's love, loving others, and the power of love in our lives.

verses.text: Love is patient, love is kind. It does not envy, it does not boast, it is not proud.
Dear friends, let us love one another, for love comes from God. Everyone who loves has been born of God and knows God.
Above all, love each other deeply, because love covers over a multitude of sins.
And now these three remain: faith, hope and love. But the greatest of these is love.
For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life.

title: Faith
description: Scriptures about trusting God, walking by faith, and strengthening your belief.

verses.text: Now faith is confidence in what we hope for and assurance about what we do not see.
For we live by faith, not by sight.
Trust in the Lord with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding.
And without faith it is impossible to please God, because anyone who comes to him must believe that he exists.
I have fought the good fight, I have finished the race, I have kept the faith.

title: Hope
description: Verses about hope in God, finding strength in His promises, and looking forward with confidence.

verses.text: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future.
But those who hope in the Lord will renew their strength. They will soar on wings like eagles.
May the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace as you trust in him.
Be joyful in hope, patient in affliction, faithful in prayer.
We have this hope as an anchor for the soul, firm and secure.

title: Strength
description: Bible verses about God's strength, being courageous, and finding power in Him.

verses.text: I can do all this through him who gives me strength.
The Lord is my strength and my shield; my heart trusts in him, and he helps me.
Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid; do not be discouraged.
God is our refuge and strength, an ever-present help in trouble.
The Lord is my rock, my fortress and my deliverer; my God is my rock, in whom I take refuge.

title: Peace
description: Scriptures about finding peace in God, calming anxiety, and resting in His presence.

verses.text: Peace I leave with you; my peace I give you. I do not give to you as the world gives.
Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God.
You will keep in perfect peace those whose minds are steadfast, because they trust in you.
The Lord gives strength to his people; the Lord blesses his people with peace.
Cast all your anxiety on him because he cares for you.

title: Prayer
description: Verses about the power of prayer, how to pray, and God's response to our prayers.

verses.text: The Lord is near to all who call on him, to all who call on him in truth.
If my people, who are called by my name, will humble themselves and pray and seek my face, I will hear from heaven.
Ask and it will be given to you; seek and you will find; knock and the door will be opened to you.
Rejoice always, pray continually, give thanks in all circumstances.
The prayer of a righteous person is powerful and effective.

title: Forgiveness
description: Bible verses about God's forgiveness, forgiving others, and the freedom of mercy.

verses.text: If we confess our sins, he is faithful and just and will forgive us our sins and purify us from all unrighteousness.
Bear with each other and forgive one another if any of you has a grievance against someone. Forgive as the Lord forgave you.
As far as the east is from the west, so far has he removed our transgressions from us.
Be kind and compassionate to one another, forgiving each other, just as in Christ God forgave you.
For if you forgive other people when they sin against you, your heavenly Father will also forgive you.

title: Gratitude
description: Scriptures about being thankful, praising God, and cultivating a heart of gratitude.

verses.text: Give thanks to the Lord, for he is good; his love endures forever.
Rejoice always, pray continually, give thanks in all circumstances; for this is God's will for you in Christ Jesus.
Enter his gates with thanksgiving and his courts with praise; give thanks to him and praise his name.
Every good and perfect gift is from above, coming down from the Father of the heavenly lights.
Let the peace of Christ rule in your hearts, since as members of one body you were called to peace. And be thankful.

title: Wisdom
description: Verses about seeking God's wisdom, understanding, and discernment for daily life.

verses.text: If any of you lacks wisdom, you should ask God, who gives generously to all without finding fault.
The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom, and knowledge of the Holy One is understanding.
For the Lord gives wisdom; from his mouth come knowledge and understanding.
Trust in the Lord with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding.
The wisdom that comes from heaven is first of all pure; then peace-loving, considerate, submissive.

title: Healing
description: Bible verses about God's healing power, restoration, and comfort in times of illness.

verses.text: He heals the brokenhearted and binds up their wounds.
By his wounds we are healed.
The Lord sustains them on their sickbed and restores them from their bed of illness.
Is anyone among you sick? Let them call the elders of the church to pray over them.
Dear friend, I pray that you may enjoy good health and that all may go well with you.

title: Comfort
description: Scriptures about God's comfort during grief, loss, and difficult seasons of life.

verses.text: The Lord is close to the brokenhearted and saves those who are crushed in spirit.
Blessed are those who mourn, for they will be comforted.
He will wipe every tear from their eyes. There will be no more death or mourning or crying or pain.
Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.
God is our refuge and strength, an ever-present help in trouble.

title: Joy
description: Verses about finding joy in the Lord, celebrating His goodness, and living with gladness.

verses.text: The joy of the Lord is your strength.
Rejoice in the Lord always. I will say it again: Rejoice!
You make known to me the path of life; you will fill me with joy in your presence.
This is the day that the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad in it.
May the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace as you trust in him.
